scope: TG-P14.9 generated 8B attention W==D (live-split tile + split-preserving fused combine + REDUCE_ACC_UPCAST_FIX)
note: Near-miss on the strict >=98%-at-both-contexts bar; refute is at ctx4096 only. Route family NOT refuted on merits (0.5-2.6% away). Keep default-off; DECODE_LIVE_SPLIT_FUSED_COMBINE and DECODE_ATTN_LIVE_SPLIT_GENERATED remain opt-in.
comparator: owned HIP amdgcn tile (DECODE_ATTN_AMDGCN_TILE=1, g5 off)
harness: extra/qk_tg_p5_attention_wd.py (same-session, warmup + NMEAS median decode ms; NMEAS=40 primary run)

fused_combine_contribution.interpretation: The split-preserving fused combine (now compilable via REDUCE_ACC_UPCAST_FIX) recovers ~2pp at ctx4096 over the shipped 2-kernel combine, confirming the combine was a real part of the ctx4096 cap. It is not enough to clear 98%.

prior_vs_now.old_fixed_L_g5_route: ctx512 ~87.6% / ctx4096 ~95.6% (TG-P5/P8; ctx512 SPLIT_GEOMETRY over-launch cap, ctx4096 COMBINE_OVERHEAD cap)
prior_vs_now.what_changed: live-split geometry removed the ctx512 over-launch cap (87.6->99.1); the split-preserving fused combine removed most of the ctx4096 combine cap (95.6->97.5).

correctness.harness_token_match: UNRELIABLE -- extra/qk_tg_p5_attention_wd.py steps from start_pos=ck without prefilling the KV cache (same unprefilled-KV bug as qk_decode_token_match_check.py), so owned and candidate subprocesses read different uninitialized KV and never token-match regardless of route correctness. Confirmed: the unchanged shipped combine in the live-split tile ALSO reports token_match=False. The harness TG_P5_REFUTE...TOKEN_MISMATCH verdict is a harness artifact, not a route error.
correctness.isolated_numeric: The generated combine shapes are numerically correct in isolation (TG-P10 / TG-P14.8: rel_err < 1e-3 vs numpy reference, no NaN). The fused combine is a different reduction algorithm than owned so it is not bit-identical; definitive in-model token-equivalence is blocked on the harness KV bug, not demonstrated wrong.

decision: REFUTE_ON_SPEED at ctx4096 (97.5% < 98%). Do not promote. Ledger as near-parity; the route family is reopenable (not refuted on merits) if the remaining ctx4096 gap is closed.
